analysis: The project is a website focused on black holes with an existing dark, cosmic theme. The current files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for creating an interactive and animated page about black holes. The CSS file needs to be completed with full dark, cosmic theme elements, including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML file requires completion to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. The JavaScript file needs to be updated to fix syntax errors and complete the functionality for interactive elements.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented.
